zh.Chagford,,Devon,England: 英國英格蘭戴文哈福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Prowse於1407年出生在英國英格蘭戴文哈福德時，他的父親John Prowse19歲，母親Lady Agnes Bampfield26歲。他於大約1448年與Margaret Norton在英國戴文哈福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1465年在英國戴文哈福德享年58歲。

zh-hans.Chagford,,Devon,England: 英国英格兰戴文哈福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Prowse于1407年出生在英国英格兰戴文哈福德时，他的父亲John Prowse19岁，母亲Lady Agnes Bampfield26岁。他于大约1448年与Margaret Norton在英国戴文哈福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1465年在英国戴文哈福德享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Prowse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): nickname from Middle English prous, prus, variant forms of prou ‘brave, valiant, proud’ (see Prue ).
English (Devon and Cornwall): ethnic name: from Middle English Prus(se), Pruce ‘Prussia, Prussian’, for someone from that region. Compare Sprouse .
Americanized form of German   Prause   or   Praus  , or perhaps of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Prue
meanings: English (Warwickshire): nickname from Middle English prou, preu(e), prue ‘brave, valiant, proud’ (Old French pro, pr(o)u, preu). Compare Prowse .

variants.name: Prouse
meanings: Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Preuss  .
Americanized form of German Brause 2, a nickname for a violent, stormy person, from Middle High German brūs ‘noise, storm’.

variants.name: Prows
meanings: Variant of   Prowse  , a surname of English or German origin.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Prowse was born in 1407, in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Prowse, was 19 and his mother, Lady Agnes Bampfield, was 26. He married Margaret Norton about 1448, in Chagford, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1465, in Chagford, Devon, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Prowse est né en 1407, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Prowse, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Bampfield, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Norton environ 1448, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1465, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Prowse 1407 in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Prowse 19 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes Bampfield 26. Er hat um 1448 in Chagford, Devon, England Margaret Norton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1465 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Chagford, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Prowse è nato il nel 1407 nel Chagford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Prowse, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes Bampfield, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Norton circa 1448, nel Chagford, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1465, nel Chagford, Devon, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Prowseが1407年にイギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォードで生まれた時，父John Prowseは19歳，母Lady Agnes Bampfieldは26歳であった。約1448年にイギリスデボンチャグフォードでMargaret Nortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1465年にイギリスデボンチャグフォードで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Prowse(이)가 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 차그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Prowse(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Bampfield(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1448년 영국 데폰 차그퍼드에서 Margaret Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1465년 영국 데폰 차그퍼드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Prowse nasceu em 1407, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Prowse, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Bampfield, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Norton aproximadamente 1448, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1465, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Prowse родился в 1407 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Prowse было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Bampfield, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Norton около 1448 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1465 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Prowse nació en 1407, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Prowse, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Bampfield, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Norton aproximadamente 1448, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1465, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
